steps.name: Creating Inwarranty Job with Create Job API
Setting up the BASE_URI,ContentType as Application/JSON and attaching the sensitive data filter for a role and attaching payload
Getting the property value from the config file
Getting the Auth Token for the role

parameters.name: payload
parameters.value: CreateJobPayload[mst_service_location_id=1, mst_platform_id=2, mst_warrenty_status_id=1, mst_oem_id=1, customer=Customer[first_name=Debika, last_name=Nag, mobile_number=7434565434, mobile_number_alt=, email_id=debika0989@gmail.com, email_id_alt=], customer_address=CustomerAddress[flat_number=912, apartment_name=Thames, street_name=Napier, landmark=Station, area=Reading, pincode=700129, country=Berkshire, state=UK], customer_product=CustomerProduct[dop=2026-03-19T23:53:56.815638611Z, serial_number=88886596754988, imei1=88886596754988, imei2=88886596754988, popurl=2026-03-19T23:53:56.815707309Z, product_id=1, mst_model_id=1], problems=[Problems[id=1, remark=Battery Issue]]]
